title: All About My Mother
posterAlt: All About My Mother (1999) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Following the tragic death of her teenage son, Manuela travels from Madrid to Barcelona in an attempt to contact the long-estranged father the boy never knew. She reunites with an old friend, an outspoken transgender sex worker, and befriends a troubled actress and a pregnant, HIV-positive nun.
synopsis: Released in 1999, All About My Mother is a comedy and drama film from Spain and France. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
